Title: Upload valid profile photo in JPG format
Objective: Verify functionality for tai len profile photo format JPG successfully va cap nhat vao thong tin student.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Currently on Student Detail page of a student without profile photo (displaying default photo).
Steps:
1. Select student PNV26001 va mo trang Chi tiet Hoc sinh.
2. Nhap select bieu tuong tai profile photo.
3. Select file student_avatar.jpg tu thiet bi.
4. Observe preview photo display tren man hinh.
5. Nhan nut "Save" (Save).
ExpectedResult:
System display notification tai len successfully.
Anh xem truoc display tuc thi tren interface truoc khi save.
Sau khi save, thong tin student duoc cap nhat: profile photo display kieu hinh tron tai Sidebar chi tiet (200x200 px) va danh sach student (52x52 px).
File photo duoc save tren Google Drive duoi ten "Nguyen_Van_A_{Timestamp}.jpg" voi quyen xem "Anyone with the link".
Notes: Related to M08-F01, Rule 5.2, Google Drive Integration (Section 7)

Title: Upload valid profile photo in PNG format
Objective: Verify functionality for tai len profile photo format PNG successfully va cap nhat vao thong tin student.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Currently on Student Detail page of a student without profile photo.
Steps:
1. Select student PNV26002 va mo trang Chi tiet Hoc sinh.
2. Nhap select bieu tuong tai profile photo.
3. Select file student_avatar2.png.
4. Nhan nut "Save" (Save).
ExpectedResult:
System display notification tai len successfully.
Anh dai dien PNG display chinh xac kieu hinh tron o tat ca cac vi tri.
File photo duoc tai len Google Drive va duoc dat ten theo format {StudentName}_{Timestamp}.jpg.

Title: Replace current profile photo
Objective: Verify khi tai len new profile photo, system tu dong cap nhat thong tin student va delete file old photo tren Google Drive.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Hoc sinh PNV26001 da co san old profile photo tren system va Google Drive.
Steps:
1. Select student PNV26001 va mo trang Chi tiet Hoc sinh.
2. Nhap select tai new profile photo.
3. Select file new_avatar.jpg.
4. Nhan nut "Save" (Save).
5. Verify thu muc archive tren Google Drive.
ExpectedResult:
System display notification replace successfully.
Anh dai dien moi display tren system.
File old photo cua student PNV26001 tren Google Drive bi delete hoan toan khoi thu muc archive (khong giu lai file cu).
Chi con lai file new photo tren Google Drive.

Title: Delete current profile photo (Soft Delete)
Objective: Verify functionality for delete profile photo cua student, chuyen file cu vao Google Drive Trash va display avatar mac dinh.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Hoc sinh PNV26001 da co san profile photo tren system.
Steps:
1. Select student PNV26001 va mo trang Chi tiet Hoc sinh.
2. Nhap select nut "Delete photo" (Remove Photo).
3. Xac nhan delete khi system display hop thoai xac nhan.
4. Nhan nut "Save" (Save).
5. Verify Google Drive Trash.
ExpectedResult:
Anh dai dien cu cua student bi delete khoi interface.
System display profile photo mac dinh (initials ten student).
Tren Google Drive, file old photo cua student duoc di chuyen vao trash (Drive Trash) chu khong bi permanently deleted ngay lap tuc.

Title: Hien thi avatar mac dinh khi student chua co profile photo
Objective: Verify system display profile photo mac dinh la 2 initials cua ten student khi khong co photo.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Hoc sinh "Nguyen Van A" chua tai profile photo len system.
Steps:
1. Vao danh sach student.
2. Tim student "Nguyen Van A".
3. Observe profile photo display ben canh ten student.
4. Verify tai trang Chi tiet student va man hinh Home Dashboard.
ExpectedResult:
System tu dong display profile photo dang hinh tron chua 2 initials la "NA" (initials cua Ten va Ho).
Anh mac dinh nay display dong bo o ca danh sach student va chi tiet student.

Title: Verify kich thuoc display profile photo o cac vi tri khac nhau
Objective: Verify profile photo display dung kich thuoc cau hinh va dung format hinh tron o moi man hinh.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Hoc sinh PNV26001 da co profile photo hop le.
Steps:
1. Xem photo student tai danh sach student.
2. Nhap xem chi tiet student PNV26001 va observe Sidebar.
3. Mo Dialog edit thong tin student.
4. Ve man hinh Home Dashboard va tim profile photo student do.
ExpectedResult:
Anh dai dien display as hinh tron voi kich thuoc chuan:
- Danh sach student: 52 x 52 px
- Dialog edit student: 120 x 120 px
- Sidebar chi tiet student: 200 x 200 px
- Home Dashboard: 52 x 52 px

Title: Nhan Save profile photo khi chua select file photo
Objective: Verify system bao error khi user co tinh save photo ma chua select tep tin nao.
Preconditions:
Nguoi dung log in quyen Staff.
Dang mo trang Chi tiet Hoc sinh cua mot student chua co photo.
Steps:
1. Select student PNV26001.
2. Kich hoat che do tai profile photo.
3. Khong select bat ky file nao tu thiet bi.
4. Nhan nut "Save" (Save) hoac nut xac nhan tai len.
ExpectedResult:
System display cphoto bao error requires select tep tin hinh photo (e.g.: "Image file is required" hoac tuong duong).
Khong co bat ky thay doi nao duoc thuc hien.

Title: Upload file not format hinh photo
Objective: Verify system chan tai len cac tep tin co format is not a photo (nhu .pdf, .docx, .txt).
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Dang mo trang Chi tiet Hoc sinh.
Steps:
1. Select student PNV26001.
2. Nhap tai profile photo va select file document.pdf.
3. Nhan nut "Save" (Save) hoac nut xac nhan tai len.
ExpectedResult:
System khong chap nhan file PDF.
Hien thi notification error requires tep tin hinh photo hop le (e.g.: "Invalid file format. Please upload JPG or PNG image").
Khong allows save tep tin nay lam profile photo.

Title: Verify cau truc ten file save tren Google Drive
Objective: Dam bao file photo tai len duoc doi ten theo dung format {StudentName}_{Timestamp}.jpg.
Preconditions:
Nguoi dung log in quyen Staff.
Hoc sinh ten "John Smith" chua co photo.
Steps:
1. Select student "John Smith" va tai len photo avatar.jpg.
2. Nhan "Save" (Save).
3. Log in vao account Google Drive quan tri, mo thu muc archive cau hinh.
4. Tim kiem file new photo tai len va kiem tra ten file.
ExpectedResult:
File photo duoc archive tren Google Drive co ten chinh xac la "John_Smith_YYYYMMDDHHMMSS.jpg" (trong do YYYYMMDDHHMMSS la period luc tai len).
Dinh dang file duoc chuan hoa thanh duoi mo rong .jpg.
Notes: Related to Storage Information (Section 3), Google Drive Integration (Section 7)

Title: Upload photo cho student co ten chua ky tu tieng Viet co dau
Objective: Verify whether ten file tren Google Drive co duoc xu ly chuan hoa ky tu tieng Viet co dau va khoang trang hay khong.
Preconditions:
Nguoi dung log in quyen Staff.
Co student ten "Nguyen Hoang Nam".
Steps:
1. Mo trang chi tiet student "Nguyen Hoang Nam" va tai len profile photo.
2. Nhan "Save".
3. Mo Google Drive kiem tra ten file photo vua create.
ExpectedResult:
File photo duoc tai len successfully.
Ten file tren Google Drive duoc chuan hoa (e.g. chuyen thanh "Nguyen_Hoang_Nam_{Timestamp}.jpg" hoac giu nguyen ky tu tieng Viet co dau nhung khoang trang thay bang gach duoi va khong bi error display/ma hoa ky tu).
Notes: Related to Storage Information (Section 3), Google Drive Integration (Section 7)

Title: Verify quyen access tep tin (File Permission) tren Google Drive
Objective: Dam bao tep tin photo tai len duoc cau hinh quyen chia se cong khai o che do chi xem de system display duoc.
Preconditions:
Nguoi dung log in quyen Staff.
Tai photo len cho student PNV26001 successfully.
Steps:
1. Mo account Google Drive quan tri, tim file photo cua student PNV26001 vua tai len.
2. Nhap chuot phai select "Chia se" (Share) -> "Nhan lien ket" (Get link).
3. Verify cai dat quyen access chung.
ExpectedResult: Quyen access chung cua file duoc thiet lap la "Bat ky ai co lien ket nay" (Anyone with the link) va vai tro duoc gan la "Nguoi xem" (Viewer / View only).
Notes: Related to Storage Information (Section 3), Google Drive Integration (Section 7)

Title: Upload photo co size lon
Objective: Verify phan hoi cua system khi co gang tai len mot hinh photo co kich thuoc tep tin lon.
Preconditions:
Nguoi dung log in quyen Staff.
Dang mo interface tai profile photo.
Steps:
1. Upload tep tin large_photo.jpg size 15MB.
2. Nhan nut "Save" (Save).
ExpectedResult: System tai len successfully neu khong cau hinh gioi han kich thuoc, HOAC neu system co gioi han size: display notification error requires photo nho hon muc quy dinh (e.g.: "File size exceeds limit") va ngan khong cho tai len.
Notes: Related to Test Data Preparation (Section 11 - Large image)

Title: Upload hinh photo co phan mo rong viet hoa (.JPG / .PNG)
Objective: Verify system nhan dien va chap nhan cac duoi mo rong viet hoa nhu .JPG, .PNG ma khong bao error format.
Preconditions:
Nguoi dung log in quyen Staff.
Dang mo interface tai profile photo.
Steps:
1. Upload tep tin avatar.JPG (duoi JPG viet hoa).
2. Nhan nut "Save" (Save).
ExpectedResult:
System nhan dien .JPG la format hinh photo hop le.
Tai photo successfully, cap nhat thong tin student binh thuong.
Notes: Related to Validation Rules (Section 8 - Image File)

Title: Upload failed do error ket noi Google Drive
Objective: Verify system khong save link photo error va giu nguyen thong tin student neu qua trinh tai len Google Drive failed.
Preconditions:
User is logged in as Staff.
Hoc sinh PNV26003 chua co profile photo.
Duong truyen Google Drive bi ngat ket noi hoac error dich vu trong luc tai.
Steps:
1. Select student PNV26003 va mo trang Chi tiet Hoc sinh.
2. Select tai len file student_avatar3.jpg.
3. Nhan "Save" (Save).
4. Observe notification error va kiem tra thong tin student.
ExpectedResult:
System display notification error tai len (e.g.: "Upload failed" hoac "Google Drive unavailable").
Thong tin student khong bi thay doi, khong save duong dan hong (broken link) vao ho so.
Hoc sinh van tiep tuc display avatar mac dinh.

Title: Upload failed do thu muc Google Drive chua cau hinh
Objective: Verify hanh vi cua system khi co gang tai photo len trong khi thu muc Google Drive chua duoc thiet lap.
Preconditions:
Nguoi dung log in quyen Staff.
Thu muc archive Google Drive chua duoc cau hinh trong system.
Steps:
1. Mo trang Chi tiet Hoc sinh PNV26001.
2. Select tai len file student_avatar.jpg.
3. Nhan nut "Save" (Save).
ExpectedResult:
System display notification error cau hinh (e.g.: "Google Drive folder not configured or unavailable" hoac "Upload error").
Qua trinh tai len bi huy bo, thong tin student khong bi thay doi.

Title: Hien thi avatar mac dinh khi URL photo bi error (HTTP 404)
Objective: Verify system tu dong phat hien URL photo bi hong va chuyen sang display avatar mac dinh.
Preconditions: Hoc sinh "Le Thi B" co URL photo trong ho so student, nhung file goc tren Google Drive da bi delete hoac khong access duoc (error 404).
Steps:
1. Log in system bang quyen Staff.
2. Truy cap danh sach student hoac chi tiet student "Le Thi B".
3. Observe profile photo display.
ExpectedResult: System phat hien khong tai duoc photo tu URL cu, tu dong display avatar mac format hinh tron chua hai initials la "LB" ma khong can bat ky can thiep thu cong nao tu user.
Notes: Related to M08-F04, Rule 5.6, Error Handling (Section 9)

Title: Verify quyen han cua Student for profile photo
Objective: Verify account Student chi co quyen xem profile photo cua minh va khong co quyen tai len, edit hoac delete photo.
Preconditions: Nguoi dung log in voi quyen Student (email domain @student.passerellesnumeriques.org).
Steps:
1. Log in vao Student Portal.
2. Truy cap trang thong tin personal.
3. Verify su ton tai cua cac nut "Tai photo len" (Upload), "Thay the" (Replace) hoac "Delete photo" (Remove).
4. Thu tim cach tuong tac edit profile photo.
ExpectedResult:
Hoc sinh can nhin thay profile photo cua minh display o goc man hinh hoac trang thong tin.
Khong co nut hoac tuy select nao de tai len, replace hoac delete photo tren interface.
Status access hoan toan la Chi xem (Read-only).

Title: Verify chan goi truc tiep API upload tu account Student
Objective: Verify co che bao mat phia backend denies requires upload/replace/delete profile photo gui tu account Student.
Preconditions:
Nguoi dung log in quyen Student.
Su dung DevTools hoac cong cu ben Tuesday gui request truc tiep den ham upload/replace/remove photo cua backend.
Steps:
1. Thuc hien gui request truc tiep den API upload/replace/remove photo su dung token/session cua Student.
2. Observe phan hoi tra ve tu backend.
ExpectedResult:
Backend denies requires, tra ve ma error denies quyen access (Access Denied / Unauthorized).
Thong tin profile photo student khong bi photo huong.

Title: Tu choi access for account external organization
Objective: Dam bao user voi email khong thuoc organization (e.g.: @gmail.com) cannot access system va xem profile photo.
Preconditions: Nguoi dung su dung account email personal not domain @passerellesnumeriques.org hay @student.passerellesnumeriques.org.
Steps:
1. Mo trinh duyet an danh.
2. Truy cap URL cua system.
3. Log in bang account guest_user@gmail.com.
ExpectedResult:
System denies log in va redirect user den trang "Access Denied" (Tu choi access).
Khong xem duoc bat cu thong tin student nao bao gom ca profile photo.
Notes: Related to Docs - Section 4 (User Roles) & Section 6 (Authentication Flow)

Title: Verify khong tich hop tinh nang edit/cat photo
Objective: Verify system khong tich hop cac chuc nang edit photo, cat photo hoac xem lich su cac old profile photo.
Preconditions:
Nguoi dung log in quyen Staff.
Dang trong tien trinh select va chuan bi tai photo len.
Steps:
1. Select tai len file avatar.jpg.
2. Observe cac nut va tuy select thao tac display tren interface xem truoc photo.
3. Verify whether co chuc nang xoay, cat (crop) hoac xem danh sach old photo da tai len khong.
ExpectedResult:
Interface chi display preview photo don gian de user kiem tra truc quan.
Khong co cong cu edit, cat ghep hoac xem lai phien ban old photo nao tren system.
